scripts.dev: concurrently -n types,web,api -c yellow,blue,green "npm run dev --workspace=@premonition/types" "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:api"
scripts.dev:test: concurrently -n types,web,api -c yellow,blue,green "npm run dev --workspace=@premonition/types" "npm run dev:web:test" "npm run dev:api:test"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@premonition/types && npm run build --workspace=web && npm run build --workspace=api
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=web && npm run lint --workspace=api
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace=@premonition/types && npm run typecheck --workspace=api
